summary: Diagnosed root cause of K26-K BLOCKED status: PREVIEW_SCORING_ACCUMULATED_DELTA_MISMATCH. The solver's accumulated bestScore drifts from the true calculateScoreWithDetails of bestState. Fixed preview.ts to use re-scored bestDetails for scoreAfter and blocked check. Controlled trial now correctly reports BLOCKED_WITH_EXPLICIT_HC6.
rootCauseEvidence: Applying preview proposed changes gives hardScore=-2000 (HC6=2) but preview originally reported hardScore=0

changes: scoreAfter now uses bestDetails.hardScore/softScore (from calculateScoreWithDetails) instead of solveResult.bestScore
blocked check now uses scoreAfter.hardScore !== 0 instead of solveResult.bestScore.hardScore !== 0

hc6Classifier.automotiveClassGroupRule: classGroup name contains 汽车/车辆/新能源/智能网联/汽修
hc6Classifier.nonAutomotiveClassGroupRule: classGroup name doesn't contain automotive keywords
hc6Classifier.mixedClassGroupRule: Triggers HC6 if any non-automotive classGroup exists AND assigned to Linxiao
hc6Classifier.courseNameRemarkRule: ONLY used when classGroup is empty; cannot override classGroup hard rule

nonGoals: solver algorithm unchanged (only preview.ts scoring reporting)

recommendation.blockedReason: HC6 violations are real: slot244 (职业素养 in 林校305) solver-introduced + slot383 (林业法规 in 林校304) pre-existing
recommendation.recommendedNextStage: K26-K4A-HC6-DATA-REPAIR (resolve HC6 via data fix) OR K26-K4C-SOLVER-HC6-AWARE (add HC5/HC6 to isPlacementHardCompatible)
